title: Hue-Style Beef Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and flavorful Vietnamese noodle soup originating from Hue, made with beef, herbs, and spices.

ingredients.name: Beef (thinly sliced)
ingredients.notes: Rare steak or thinly sliced beef works best

ingredients.name: Red bean paste
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with sweetened red bean paste

ingredients.name: Gooey bun
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with fresh spring rolls or rice paper

ingredients.name: Vietnamese chili sauce (nuoc cham)
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: Hue-style beef broth
ingredients.notes: Can be made with beef broth and spices

ingredients.name: Rice noodles
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried noodles work best

instructions: Bring Hue-style beef broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add sliced beef to the pot and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add red bean paste and cook for an additional minute.
Cook rice noodles according to package instructions.
Assemble noodle soup bowls with cooked noodles, beef, and broth.
Garnish with fresh cilantro, mint, and a lime wedge.
Serve immediately with Vietnamese chili sauce on the side.
